title: Fiery Spicy Ukrainian Cashew Nut Skewers
description: A spicy and shattering crowd-pleaser featuring cashew nuts, this Ukrainian dish is sure to ignite your taste buds, with a shio-cure and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together shio cure, ayurvedic tamasic spice blend, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper.
Add the cashew nuts to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Drizzle the olive oil over the cashew nuts and toss again to combine.
Season the cashew nuts with salt and black pepper to taste.
Thread the cashew nuts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each nut.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Fiery Spicy Ukrainian Cashew Nut Skewers hot and enjoy.
